segments.text: The Lord said to Moses,
Command the Israelites and say to them:
When you enter Canaan, the land that will be allotted to you as an inheritance is to have these boundaries:
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Your southern side will include some of the Desert of Zin along the border of Edom. Your southern boundary will start in the east from the southern end of the Dead Sea,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: cross south of Scorpion Pass, continue on to Zin and go south of Kadesh Barnea. Then it will go to Hazar Addar and over to Azmon,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: where it will turn, join the Wadi of Egypt and end at the Mediterranean Sea.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Your western boundary will be the coast of the Mediterranean Sea. This will be your boundary on the west.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For your northern boundary, run a line from the Mediterranean Sea to Mount Hor
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: and from Mount Hor to Lebo Hamath. Then the boundary will go to Zedad,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: continue to Ziphron and end at Hazar Enan. This will be your boundary on the north.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For your eastern boundary, run a line from Hazar Enan to Shepham.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The boundary will go down from Shepham to Riblah on the east side of Ain and continue along the slopes east of the Sea of Galilee.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then the boundary will go down along the Jordan and end at the Dead Sea. This will be your land, with its boundaries on every side.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Moses commanded the Israelites:
Assign this land by lot as an inheritance. The Lord has ordered that it be given to the nine-and-a-half tribes,
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: because the families of the tribe of Reuben, the tribe of Gad and the half-tribe of Manasseh have received their inheritance.
These two-and-a-half tribes have received their inheritance east of the Jordan across from Jericho, toward the sunrise.
The Lord said to Moses,
These are the names of the men who are to assign the land for you as an inheritance: Eleazar the priest and Joshua son of Nun.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And appoint one leader from each tribe to help assign the land.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: These are their names: Caleb son of Jephunneh, from the tribe of Judah;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Shemuel son of Ammihud, from the tribe of Simeon;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Elidad son of Kislon, from the tribe of Benjamin;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Bukki son of Jogli, the leader from the tribe of Dan;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Hanniel son of Ephod, the leader from the tribe of Manasseh son of Joseph;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Kemuel son of Shiphtan, the leader from the tribe of Ephraim son of Joseph;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Elizaphan son of Parnak, the leader from the tribe of Zebulun;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Paltiel son of Azzan, the leader from the tribe of Issachar;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Ahihud son of Shelomi, the leader from the tribe of Asher;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Pedahel son of Ammihud, the leader from the tribe of Naphtali.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: These are the men the Lord commanded to assign the inheritance to the Israelites in the land of Canaan.
